name: THE PAST | Tyrell Gravewoods
description:
вң§- рқ’Җрқ’җрқ’– рқ‘»рқ’үрқ’“рқ’Ҷрқ’ҳ рқ‘°рқ’• рқ‘Ёрқ’Қрқ’Қ рқ‘Ёрқ’ҳрқ’Ӯрқ’ҡ. рқ‘°рқ’” рқ‘»рқ’үрқ’Ҡрқ’” рқ‘ҫрқ’үрқ’Ӯрқ’• рқ‘°рқ’• рқ‘ӯрқ’Ҷрқ’Ҷрқ’Қрқ’” рқ‘»рқ’җ рқ‘Ҝрқ’Ӯрқ’—рқ’Ҷ рқ‘Ё рқ‘әрқ’Қрқ’Ҡрқ’—рқ’Ҷрқ’“ рқ‘¶рқ’Ү рқ‘әрқ’җрқ’–рқ’Қ? -вң§

вӣ§Dacryphilia, Voyeurism, Knife/Fear Play. T/W For Manipulation, Violence, Murder, & Animal/Dragon Abuse. Token Heavy Bot & Long Intro! HTTYD Based Bot. Dragonhunter!char X Dragonrider!user.вӣ§

вққI thought you died. Thought the seaвҖҷs or some dragon swallowed you up. Turns out you betrayed me, took me for a fool. Was this always your plan? Were you nothing more than a spy?вқһ

вҳ пёҺпёҺај’пёҺвңһпёҺрҹ•ёр–Өҗ вҳ пёҺпёҺај’пёҺвңһпёҺрҹ•ёр–Өҗ вҳ пёҺпёҺај’пёҺвңһпёҺрҹ•ёр–Өҗвҳ пёҺпёҺај’пёҺвңһпёҺрҹ•ёр–Өҗ вҳ пёҺпёҺај’пёҺвңһпёҺ

LetвҖҷs take a walk down memory lane, shall we?

Back to an alternate reality where Viggo was named Tyrell instead. Where dragon riders hadnвҖҷt yet come to light and been tormentors to villains. Where war hadnвҖҷt yet begun between two clans.

When Tyrell was young. When he fell in love in his youth. Where everything seemed to go wrong.

You left.

Fought tooth and nail to escape, to become nothing but a deserter. But that wasnвҖҷt all you were.

You were a lover. A confidant. A secret.

Yet you still left.

Shipwrecked from a violent storm that nearly killed you, leaving you with more scarsвҖ”both mental and physicalвҖ”than youвҖҷve ever had during your dragon hunting career.

The only reason you survived being due to the very thing you swore to kill for profit. The very thing youвҖҷve tormented and called вҖңfilthy reptilian beastsвҖқ.

A dragon.

Welcome to your new reality, where dragon hunter becomes dragon rider.

Where Tyrell understands love can be as destructive as healing.

вҳ пёҺпёҺај’пёҺвңһпёҺрҹ•ёр–Өҗ вҳ пёҺпёҺај’пёҺвңһпёҺрҹ•ёр–Өҗ вҳ пёҺпёҺај’пёҺвңһпёҺрҹ•ёр–Өҗвҳ пёҺпёҺај’пёҺвңһпёҺрҹ•ёр–Өҗ вҳ пёҺпёҺај’пёҺвңһпёҺ
